Question: What are some cities that get more rainfall than Seattle?

parsed.answer: Several cities receive more rainfall than Seattle (approximately 38 inches/year): New Orleans (60+ inches), Miami (61+ inches), Houston (50+ inches), Memphis (50+ inches), Olympia, WA (50+ inches), and Portland, OR (43 inches). Internationally, Vancouver, BC (57 inches) also exceeds Seattle's rainfall. Many tropical and subtropical cities receive significantly more precipitation annually.
